tasks.label: compile pmarket
args: if (!(Test-Path 'lib/h2.jar')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'lib' | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/com/h2database/h2/2.2.224/h2-2.2.224.jar' -OutFile 'lib/h2.jar' }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'target/classes' | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem -Path 'src' -Recurse -Filter '*.java' | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName } | Set-Content -Encoding ASCII 'target/sources.txt'; javac -encoding UTF-8 -d 'target/classes' -cp 'lib/h2.jar' '@target/sources.txt'
